title: Dettol Power and Pure Antibacterial Bathroom Cleaner Spray, Limescale and Stain remover, Kills 99.9 Percent of Bacteria, 1 L,Package may vary
features: KILLS 99.9 Percent OF BACTERIA - As well as antibiotic MRSA, E.coli, Salmonella, Rotavirus, Flu virus (H1N1) and 90 percent of all allergens
3X Cleaning Power: the active oxygen formula penetrates and dissolves grease, dirt and limescale

SUITABLE TO USE on bathroom sinks, taps, toilet seat & bowl, shower screens, vinyl, sealed, laminated and linoleum floors. Removes tough stains and soap scum. No harsh chemicals. No rinse required. Lasting fragrance
EASY TO USE - Convenient spray format, simply turn red nozzle to the ON position, and spray directly onto the surface that you wish to clean
Dettol Bathroom Spray is suitable to use in households where children are present. This product leaves no harsh chemical residue.
description: Product Description Dettol Power and Pure bathroom cleaner spray is ideal for tackling tough bathroom cleaning tasks. This bathroom cleaner has active oxygen ingredients which power through and break down stains. There’s no need to rinse afterwards, just wipe the bathroom cleaner away. As well as being tough on dirt, it kills 99.9 percent of bacteria, including E. coli and influenza virus (H1N1). Ingredients Contains: Per 100 g of product contains 1.05 g Hydrogen Peroxide and 0.125 g Benzalkonium Chloride, Contains <5% Oxygen-Based Bleaching Agent, Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactant. Disinfectant, Perfume Safety Warning Precautions: keep out of reach of children. If swallowed: call a doctor if you feel unwell. Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq See more
